ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-21-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicholas Jay appeared by zoom for Victor Toy (Executor).

The Court stated that it looks like nothing substantive has happened since the letters were issued, that there is no inventory and appraisal, and that there is no petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Mr. Jay stated that as of 9:30 a.m. this morning a petition was filed with a hearing date of February 10, 2021. Status on close of estate is off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
